sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51445" key="i)xqubole/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰχθῠβολ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n51445.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strike, harpoon fish,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.381</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Etrusc.</author> </bibl>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0181.tlg001:635" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">635</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphil.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
